title: Foliage item tint
description: [deprecated] An addon to foliage tint for the items (polytone)
body:
## [Changes in the new 1.21.4 item model system broke the item tint packs I made, and there doesnt seem to be a good solution so far, so they are going archived now. Sorry](https://github.com/MehVahdJukaar/polytone/issues/135)


### **_[REQUIRES POLYTONE](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone)_**

This is an addon for [Foliage tint](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/foliage-tint) that makes the items in the inventory follow the appearance of the plants themselves.

This is closely related to [Item tint](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/item-tint), and is basically an addon to make them work together
